extra_commands: cd /var/www/qrbanner && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const k=['NEXTAUTH_URL','NEXTAUTH_SECRET','GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID','GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET','AUTH_TRUST_HOST']; for (const x of k) console.log(x, process.env[x]? (x.includes('SECRET')||x.includes('CLIENT_SECRET')?'set':process.env[x]):'MISSING');"
pm2 show qrbanner 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'status|restarts|exec cwd' || true
